sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100761" key="sunodoipori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνοδοιπορ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n100761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">travelling together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
